text: I'm really confused! I thought I could get support anytime, but now it feels like no one is here to help. Why is that?
So I tried logging in but my password is not working, and also I got an email about my subscription, but I don’t really remember signing up for anything. What’s going on with that?
Could you please explain to me in detail the specific differences between the pro and business tiers of your service? I'm especially interested in the features and pricing options available for each.
I loved the product, but I want my money back. It didn’t work well for me at all.

Hi there! I'm reaching out because I've been having some issues with my account lately. It's been quite frustrating, especially since I just changed my profile picture and now I can't seem to log in at all. I even tried resetting my password, but it still won't let me in. Also, I wanted to know if you guys have any updates on that new feature you mentioned in the last newsletter? Thanks for your help!

Dear Support Team, I hope this message finds you well. I have a question regarding the functionality of your service that I cannot seem to clarify. Could you please provide some information? Thank you.

Hey there, I'm having some serious issues with my account, like, I can't log in and it's been super frustrating! I've tried resetting my password but nothing works, can you please help me sort this out? Thanks!
I received my package late and it's not what I ordered. Very disappointing.
Hey, I ordered a hoodie but got a t-shirt instead. Can I get a refund for the wrong item? It was like a total mix-up!
I'm really sad, I can't get into my account! It keeps saying my password is wrong even though I know it's right. Can someone please help me? 😢

I am extremely disappointed with my recent purchase from your website. I ordered a pair of shoes, and they arrived with a stain on them! I expected better quality and service. Can someone please address this issue as soon as possible? I would like a full refund.

I am writing to express my dissatisfaction with the delivery timeline of my recent order. I placed it over a week ago, and although I was assured that it would arrive within three days, I have yet to receive it. This has caused significant inconvenience, and I would like to know what you can do to rectify this situation promptly.
I accidentally paid for the whole year, but I just wanted to go month-to-month instead. Is there any way to fix this? Also, my dog is sick, which is super stressing me out.

I recently logged into my account, but I can't seem to access any of my settings. I thought I updated my email correctly, but now I'm unsure if that's the case or if my account is inactive. Can you assist me with this?
I need my money back. What do I do? It’s been more than a week!

I am really not happy with the service I received, like I can't even understand how it happened! I've tried to reach out few times already but no one seems to be helping me with this issue, can you even believe that? It's just so frustrating, almost like nobody is taking this seriously! I honestly expected better from your company! Can you please just fix it or explain what's wrong??
